name: Msirae Faythung
bio:
Physical Appearance: Nord male. Wears mostly Dremora armor of the best available quality, with Daedric gauntlets. His chest has been carved open. Wields a leveled Daedric war axe. A red aura surrounds his body from his Dagonic Cast ability.
Race: Nord
Personality Keywords: cursed, damned, tormented, failed, hostile
Role: Msirae Faythung was Mehrunes Dagon's champion but failed the Daedric Prince while trying to accomplish some unknown task. As punishment, the Dremora carved his chest open with Mehrunes' Razor and doomed him to stand statue-like in the Nefarivigum, guarding Mehrunes' Razor for eternity.
Home Location Information: The Nefarivigum, where he stands guard over Mehrunes' Razor.
His Curse: Msirae stands motionless like a statue until someone attempts to retrieve Mehrunes' Razor, at which point he awakens and attacks. The Dremora removed his beating heart and left it as a trap - if someone takes and eats his heart, Msirae awakens weakened and will eventually die even without being struck, though he attacks throughout.
His Equipment: Msirae possesses a unique ability called Dagonic Cast that surrounds him in a red aura, granting him resistance to normal weapons, magic, and complete immunity to poison. His Daedric war axe crumbles to dust if anyone tries to pick it up. His entire body disappears upon death, preventing his armor from being looted.
Personality - The Doomed Champion: Msirae is a failed champion condemned to an eternal punishment. His curse binds him to guard the very weapon that was used to carve open his chest. He exists in a statue-like state until disturbed, then attacks relentlessly even as his lack of a heart slowly kills him.
author: Bethesda
